__comment: Fixture for the scanner parity test. Stored as JSON (not .ts/.sql) so Preflight's own self-scan never classifies these intentionally-insecure snippets as code. test/run.mjs materializes each entry into a temp dir with its real extension, substitutes __CRED__ placeholders with fake-but-matching tokens, runs the CLI + scan(), and asserts they agree. Every entry is designed to trip a check.
